title: diplacus latifolius
intro: Diplacus latifolius, also known as the purple sage or Chinese sage, is a perennial plant native to China, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Diplacus latifolius include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used in infusions or added to soups and stews for its medicinal properties.
